summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Restaurateur Pro MVP iteration 2. All backend API endpoints are functional with proper authentication guards. Frontend landing page loads correctly with 'Restaurateur PRO' branding. Protected routes (dashboard, onboarding, profile) correctly redirect unauthenticated users to landing page. Pricing page is accessible without auth. All 6 module components correctly use 'profile' prop. Onboarding has 7 steps defined in code.

minor.issue: Unused 'profile' variable fetched but not used (line 911)

passed_tests: All protected endpoints correctly return 401 without auth
Landing page renders with 'Restaurateur PRO' branding
Landing page has Get Started, Learn More, Sign In, Pricing buttons
Landing page shows 3 features: Concept to Design, Build & Launch, Scale & Grow
Pricing page loads correctly with both subscription plans
Protected routes (dashboard, onboarding, profile) redirect unauthenticated users to landing
All 6 module components (CommandCenter, SiteStrategist, GroundUp, OpsLaunchpad, ExpansionToolkit, LeaseNegotiation) use 'profile' prop
Dashboard passes profile prop to all 6 modules
Onboarding has 7 steps defined: concept, location, financial, operational, menu, team, branding
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Unused 'profile' variable in /api/tasks GET endpoint (server.py line 911) - can be removed
test_credentials: None required - tested public endpoints and auth guards
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs require authentication except /api/, /api/health, and /api/subscriptions/plans. Frontend protected routes correctly redirect to landing page for unauthenticated users. The 6 dashboard modules all use 'profile' prop passed from Dashboard component. Onboarding has 7 steps. Google Auth is Emergent-managed.

features_verified.onboarding_7_steps: PASS - 7 steps defined in code (concept, location, financial, operational, menu, team, branding)
features_verified.dashboard_6_module_tabs: PASS - All 6 modules defined with data-testid attributes (tab-command, tab-site, tab-ground, tab-ops, tab-expansion, tab-lease)
features_verified.business_profile_page: PASS - Protected route redirects unauthenticated users
